title: Neuron Signal Transmission
hint: Tap the soma or Fire signal to send an action potential
guideIdle: 1) Fire a signal · 2) Toggle myelin on/off · 3) Compare how fast the gold pulse travels
guideFired: Watch the action potential race along the axon toward the terminal
guideMyelin: Myelin lets the signal jump between nodes of Ranvier — much faster!
guideNoMyelin: Without myelin the signal crawls continuously — much slower.
tapNode: Tap a blue node to restart from here
learnMore: Myelin is fatty insulation. Gaps (nodes of Ranvier) let the impulse “jump.”
